name: biav-sdk-workspace
description: npm workspace root for the Silver Core SDK family: Silver Core Agent SDK (silver-core-agent-sdk) + Silver Core Maestro SDK (silver-core-maestro-sdk). One-way dependency maestro -> agent, independent semver clocks (SCS-REQ orchestrator-sdk §2). The rest of this repository (news/wiki/site/memory/...) is not part of the npm workspace.
